ops.text: Phase 1v review COMPLETE (wf_294240f7-564, opus xhigh 3 finders + 14 refuters after the codex lane died on a usage limit mid-first-attempt — the first codex workflow returned vacuous empty findings in 61s; re-dispatched on opus with mandatory coverage evidence). Verdict: 14 confirmed findings, 0 refuted. Deduped to 6 code defects + stale prose: (1) MAJOR detect_languages honors only unanchored basename patterns from root .gitignore (anchored /vendor/, path third_party/go, nested .gitignore all ignored — reproduced live → false-positive pack activation); (2) MAJOR daemon fingerprint watches hooks/ while loader keys on capt-hook/ → malformed pack.toml-without-hooks pack fatal cold but silently ignored warm; (3) cross-pack duplicate tool name silently last-wins in pack_tool_specs, violating the shipped docs' "collision is fatal" contract; (4) MAJOR pack test/pack list zero test coverage (test_pack_lint.py's ~30 cases never ported); (5) orphaned pack_hook.py.tmpl in wheel; (6) vestigial .claude/capt-hook.toml write in test_cli.py:764. Prose staleness: pr-workflow.md skill ref, testing.qmd:36, philosophy.qmd:96, review/fix.py docstring. Fix brief dispatched to ch-rewrite (opus; codex still down) — every fix must land with a pinning test. Docs prose-quality pass (task #8) remains mine pre-tag.
